fields.summary: Represents the design-space position of a single variation axis, identified by its tag.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> pairs an axis tag with a design-space value to specify the position of a single variation axis. Arrays of these values are used with <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(System.ReadOnlySpan{SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate})" /> or <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition" />.

## Examples

```csharp
var coords = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
{
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = new SKFourByteTag('w','g','h','t'), Value = 700 },
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = new SKFourByteTag('w','d','t','h'), Value = 75 }
};
using var boldCondensed = typeface.Clone(coords);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte OpenType tag that identifies the variation axis.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> identifying the axis (e.g., 'wght' for weight).

fields.summary: Gets or sets the design-space value for this axis coordinate.
fields.value: The axis value in design space.
